---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for FluxCore
title: "feat: "
labels: ["enhancement", "needs triage"]
assignees: ""
---

## Feature Summary

<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see. -->

## Problem / Motivation

<!-- What problem does this solve? What use case drives this request? -->
<!-- Example: "As a server admin, I can't currently X, which means I have to Y manually..." -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the feature in detail. How should it work? What commands, buttons, or config would it add? -->

## Module

<!-- Which module does this belong to, or should a new module be created? -->

- [ ] Core / Infrastructure
- [ ] TempVoice System
- [ ] Moderation
- [ ] Utility
- [ ] Logging
- [ ] Economy
- [ ] Leveling
- [ ] Reaction Roles
- [ ] Ticket System
- [ ] Welcome & Goodbye
- [ ] Security & Anti-Abuse
- [ ] Fun Module
- [ ] Admin Dashboard
- [ ] New module: ___________

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- Have you considered any alternative approaches or workarounds? -->

## Implementation Notes

<!-- Optional: Any thoughts on how this could be implemented, DB schema changes needed, Discord API requirements, etc. -->

## Priority

<!-- How important is this to you? -->

- [ ] Critical — blocking my use of FluxCore
- [ ] High — would significantly improve my workflow
- [ ] Medium — nice to have
- [ ] Low — minor quality-of-life improvement

## Additional Context

<!-- Any other context, mockups, references to similar bots, or screenshots. -->
